title: Edgy Panes
description: Resource pack that makes glass panes always keep their opaque edge and not cut off awkwardly.
body:
Have you ever been annoyed by the way glass panes get their textures cut off and lose their outlines? This pack changes that! No matter the configuation, glass panes will always have a well defined edge where it belongs. 

Additionally, this Resource Pack uses **zero** custom textures, and as a result will be compatible with any Resource Packs that change glass textures.
